## Spec Reference
<!-- Link to the relevant spec section -->
**Spec Section(s):** 

## Checklist Gate
<!-- Must be completed before implementation -->
- [ ] Spec written and committed (`specs/*.md`)
- [ ] `/speckit.clarify` run — 0 high-severity ambiguities
- [ ] Technical plan created
- [ ] `/speckit.checklist` all items verifiable
- [ ] `/speckit.analyze` — no orphaned tasks, no uncovered requirements
- [ ] Constitution rules checked (list which rules apply)

## Implementation Tasks
<!-- Generated by /speckit.taskstoissues — list tasks here -->
- [ ] 

## Verification
- [ ] All checklist items pass
- [ ] Existing specs updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Constitution Rules checked (infra: 1-8, agent: 9-11)
- [ ] `entrypoint.sh` changes pass constitution rules
- [ ] Skill spec exists (Rule 11) if agent feature
- [ ] Render deploy succeeds
- [ ] `curl /api/gateway/status` returns `running`
- [ ] Telegram /estado responds (if agent feature)
